headline: Why Salesforce (CRM) Is Building an Audit Trail for Enterprise AI Agents
summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the best data governance stocks to buy for AI compliance. The latest relevant development came on April 29, 2026, when Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) launched Agentforce Operations, a system designed to automate back-office workflows using AI agents. The compliance angle is direct: Salesforce said the product can turn messy documents […]

headline: Aaron Levie Says AI Agents Will Make Work More Accessible While Giving Experts A 'Huge Edge'
summary: Aaron Levie says AI agents will democratize complex work but increase demand for experts and skilled professionals.
